body.title: Metrics are SensorTree-shaped counters + history; the metric IS the output
body.statement: Process metrics live under unseenuniversity/metrics/<area>/* as counters plus history, per the SensorTree shape (unseen_university/devices/igor/cognition/sensor_tree.py: named nodes carrying a current value and an appended history, updated in place). Metric updates are direct writes — observations, not changes — so they take no /sorted gate and file no tickets. A metric that only ever gets written and never read is dead and gets retired, not accumulated.
body.why: Observation must be cheaper than the thing observed, or it stops happening — metrics that require ceremony don't get written, and un-written metrics are how habit drift goes undetected (the audit-audits layer runs entirely on this corpus).
